# CWE-778: Insufficient Logging (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-778-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"log"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type LoginRow struct {
	Username string
	Password string
}

// Safe: security-relevant failures are logged with actor and source metadata.
func SignIn(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	user := c.PostForm("username")
	pass := c.PostForm("password")
	var row LoginRow
	if err := db.Where("username = ? AND password = ?", user, pass).First(&row).Error; err != nil {
		log.Printf("auth failure user=%s ip=%s", user, c.ClientIP())
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
